pages.title: Sick Animals
pages.text: An animal that stays stressed long enough becomes $(c)Sick$(). Sick animals move slowly and produce nothing. A smoke particle effect appears above them. Use $(l)Medicine$() to cure sickness and clear the stress counter.

pages.title: Crafting Medicine
pages.text: Right-click a sick animal with Medicine to cure it. Keep your troughs stocked to prevent illness in the first place.
